article_title: Board of Directors approves amendments to the Occupational Health and Safety Regulation and the Prevention Manual

briefs.title: WorkSafeBC amends OHS Regulation for Combustible Dusts and Standards Updates, effective 2026–2027
briefs.summary: WorkSafeBC's Board of Directors approved amendments to the OHS Regulation and Prevention Manual covering Combustible Dusts and Standards Updates. Changes take effect April 1, 2026 and January 4, 2027 respectively.
briefs.action_required: Review the amended OHS Regulation sections on Combustible Dusts and Standards Updates and update your safety program before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: WorkSafeBC OHS Regulation — Standards Updates amendments take effect
WorkSafeBC OHS Regulation — Combustible Dusts amendments take effect
